title: Prepare arborist reports
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Prepare arborist reports demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Determine report parameters from client brief

pcs.text: Review client brief and determine expectations for report outcomes
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Review client brief and determine expectations for report outcomes?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Review client brief and determine expectations for report outcomes.

pcs.text: Determine evidentiary data records according to client brief
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine evidentiary data records according to client brief?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine evidentiary data records according to client brief.

pcs.text: Determine statutory reporting requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine statutory reporting requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine statutory reporting requirements.

pcs.text: Establish specific scope and assumptions for report
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Establish specific scope and assumptions for report?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Establish specific scope and assumptions for report.

pcs.text: Evaluate requirements and limitations and determine arboricultural content
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Evaluate requirements and limitations and determine arboricultural content?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Evaluate requirements and limitations and determine arboricultural content.

pcs.text: Determine textual and visual content required for report
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine textual and visual content required for report?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine textual and visual content required for report.

pcs.text: Confirm report parameters with client
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm report parameters with client?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm report parameters with client.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Determine report parameters from client brief

elements.title: Determine and collate evidentiary data

pcs.text: Research content and information for report
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Research content and information for report?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Research content and information for report.

pcs.text: Assess primary and secondary sources of research material
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess primary and secondary sources of research material?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess primary and secondary sources of research material.

pcs.text: Evaluate the validity and reliability of researched information
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Evaluate the validity and reliability of researched information?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Evaluate the validity and reliability of researched information.

pcs.text: Inspect site and record observations relevant to scope of report
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Inspect site and record observations relevant to scope of report?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Inspect site and record observations relevant to scope of report.

pcs.text: Record visual evidence using image capture equipment required for report
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record visual evidence using image capture equipment required for report?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record visual evidence using image capture equipment required for report.

pcs.text: Obtain and record information from test results
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Obtain and record information from test results?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Obtain and record information from test results.

pcs.text: Collate and record observations, test results, research material and inspections as evidentiary data
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Collate and record observations, test results, research material and inspections as evidentiary data?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Collate and record observations, test results, research material and inspections as evidentiary data.

pcs.text: Store and back up data according to workplace data management procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Store and back up data according to workplace data management procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Store and back up data according to workplace data management procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Determine and collate evidentiary data

elements.title: Prepare a report format using a word processing program

pcs.text: Determine report structure and style to meet stakeholder and statutory outcomes

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine report structure and style to meet stakeholder and statutory outcomes.

pcs.text: Determine requirements for specific document content and layout according to arboriculture industry conventions

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine requirements for specific document content and layout according to arboriculture industry conventions.

pcs.text: Obtain permissions for copyrighted material required for report
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Obtain permissions for copyrighted material required for report?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Obtain permissions for copyrighted material required for report.

pcs.text: Produce document using a word processor according to workplace style guide and industry conventions

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Produce document using a word processor according to workplace style guide and industry conventions.

pcs.text: Incorporate collated data, information and evidentiary data into formatted report

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Incorporate collated data, information and evidentiary data into formatted report.

pcs.text: Operate computer and word processing software application to produce report
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Operate computer and word processing software application to produce report?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Operate computer and word processing software application to produce report.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Prepare a report format using a word processing program

elements.title: Formulate a conclusive determination and recommendations

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess body of evidentiary data according to scope of report.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine value of data from conflicting evidence.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop an informed decision from considered viewpoints?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop an informed decision from considered viewpoints.

pcs.text: Formulate a conclusive determination

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Formulate a conclusive determination.

pcs.text: Inform client of determination

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Inform client of determination.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop recommendations based on determination.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Compile determinations and recommendations in a draft report.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Review report content and develop and document summary for report.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Review and edit final version of report ready for distribution.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Deliver final report to client and stakeholders according to client brief.
